name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?
description: Notify employer now, file claim form with state commission, provide medical proof.

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer now, file claim form with state commission, provide medical proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Start by notifying your employer orally and in writing within 30 days**, then file Form 1 with your state's workers' comp division.

Process varies slightly: Utah Labor Commission, Idaho Industrial Commission. Employer reports to insurer who investigates.

- Gather incident report, medical records, witness statements.
- Submit claim form detailing fall circumstances.
- Expect adjuster contact; record all interactions.

If denied, appeal within deadlines (Utah: 20 days). Hire an attorney for complex cases like disputed fault.[1][5]
